title: Roblox: Firing On All Cylinders, Again
text: Following Q2 2024 earnings, analyst coverage highlighted Roblox firing on all cylinders with strong execution across key metrics. The platform achieved revenue of $893.5 million, up 31% year-over-year, exceeding mid-point guidance. Bookings reached $955 million, representing 22% year-over-year growth. The quarter marked the first time bookings exceeded $1 billion run-rate, a significant business milestone. Daily active users of 79.5 million reached all-time highs, demonstrating robust user acquisition trends. Hours engaged of 17.4 billion, up 24% year-over-year, showed sustained platform engagement. International growth accelerated with Japan DAUs up 56% and India DAUs up 57%. Management reaffirmed confidence in achieving 20%+ revenue growth through 2027. The company demonstrated operational excellence by improving loss per share to 37 cents from 46 cents year-ago. Positive sentiment from the earnings report reflected investor appreciation for the company's execution and growth trajectory. Multiple analysts initiated or upgraded coverage with positive ratings.
